examples.title: Demonstrating Auto Storage Class
examples.description: Shows automatic storage duration of local variables
examples.explanation: Demonstrates that auto variables are recreated each time the function is called. The variable x loses its value after function exits and is reinitialized to 5 on next call.

examples.title: Demonstrating Static Storage Class
examples.description: Shows static storage duration - variable retains value between calls
examples.explanation: The static local variable 'count' is initialized only once at program startup. Each function call increments and prints the retained value, demonstrating static storage duration.

examples.title: Demonstrating Extern Storage Class
examples.description: Shows external linkage - sharing variables across functions
examples.explanation: The extern keyword allows accessing 'globalVar' defined in one source file (File2.c) from another file (File1.c). Both share the same memory location.

examples.title: Demonstrating Register Storage Class
examples.description: Shows register storage request with address-of demonstration
examples.explanation: The register storage class requests the compiler to store the variable in a CPU register for faster access. The & operator cannot be used with register variables.
